label: 条带划分
description: 在区域外接矩形内沿单一方向（按行或按列）把有效格切成若干等宽条带，相邻条带之间留 gapWidth 间隙，可选在四周再留 border 边带圈。每条带输出一张独立的 0/1 网格（沿切分方向顺序排列），所有间隙与边带合并成一张 gap 网格。direction=-1 时由 seed 随机决定横/纵朝向。不能整除的余量整体并入随机一条带。
description-en: Splits the valid cells inside a region's bounding box into equal-width strips along one axis (by rows or by columns), leaving a gapWidth separator between adjacent strips and an optional border ring around the outside. Each strip is emitted as its own 0/1 grid (ordered along the split axis); all gaps and the border are merged into one gap grid. direction=-1 lets the seed pick horizontal/vertical. Any non-divisible remainder is folded into one random strip.
icon: 深色背景上一个矩形被几条等宽的横向条带平行切分，条带之间留细缝隙，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 0/1（或多值）约束区网格；条带只落在非零有效格内。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) constraint region grid; strips fall only on non-zero valid cells.

inputs.name: direction
inputs.label: 切分方向
inputs.description: 0=按行切（横向条带），1=按列切（纵向条带），-1=由种子随机决定朝向。
inputs.description-en: 0 = split by rows (horizontal strips), 1 = split by columns (vertical strips), -1 = seed picks the direction.

inputs.name: bandWidth
inputs.label: 条带厚度
inputs.description: 单条带在切分方向上的厚度（行高或列宽），最小 1。
inputs.description-en: Thickness of each strip along the split axis (row height or column width), minimum 1.

inputs.name: gapWidth
inputs.label: 间隙厚度
inputs.description: 相邻条带之间的间隙厚度（格），最小 0。间隙格归入 gap 输出，不属于任何条带。
inputs.description-en: Gap thickness (in cells) between adjacent strips, minimum 0. Gap cells go to the gap output and belong to no strip.

inputs.name: border
inputs.label: 边带圈数
inputs.description: 四周保留的边带圈数（也计入 gap），最小 0。复刻老 strip 的外圈田垄。
inputs.description-en: Border ring thickness around the outside (also counted as gap), minimum 0.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子（仅 direction=-1 决定朝向、以及余量分配时用），0 使用当前时间。
inputs.description-en: Random seed (used only for direction=-1 and remainder assignment); 0 uses current timestamp.

outputs.name: partition
outputs.label: 条带列表
outputs.description: 每条带一张 0/1 网格，沿切分方向顺序排列；空条带（被掩码截没）自动剔除。
outputs.description-en: One 0/1 grid per strip, ordered along the split axis; empty strips (clipped away by the mask) are dropped.

outputs.name: gap
outputs.label: 间隙网格
outputs.description: 所有条带间隙 + 边带格合并成的一张 0/1 网格，与输入同形状。
outputs.description-en: A single 0/1 grid merging all inter-strip gaps and the border ring; same shape as the input.

outputs.name: count
outputs.label: 条带数
outputs.description: 实际切出的非空条带数量。
